title: Social Worker (Family Service)
description:
REACH Family Service is a community based social service agency commissioned and funded by the Ministry of Social and Family Development. We serve vulnerable and low-income families and individuals residing in the Bishan, Sin Ming, Shunfu and Thomson vicinity. We collaborate with clients to harness their strengths and resources as well as to provide the support they need to face challenges and strengthen family bonds.


JOIN US if you are a passionate individual, service oriented and capable of working effectively in group settings and committed to exemplify the values of the profession and the agency.


The role of the Social Worker is to provide support for low-income and/or vulnerable individuals and families with social and emotional issues, and work towards stability, self-reliance and social mobility.

He / She is responsible to develop and implement intervention plans according to professional judgement and knowledge, conduct casework and group work as well as implement and evaluate community development activities and programmes to address service gaps in the community.


Key Responsibilities:

· Provide casework intervention, counselling and information & referral to families in line with REACH FSC Guidelines and MSF’S Services and Practice Standards for FSC.

· Attend to callers/walk-ins and refer clients to appropriate agencies.

· Maintain timely and detailed case recordings.

· Ensure KPIs and standards of C&C are met.

· Participate in supervision sessions and maintain proper recording of supervision, especially for risk cases.

· Undertake supervision of interns, if assigned.

· Develop, plan, lead, and evaluate evidence-based programmes/ group work with research components.

· Network and collaborate with other organization/community stakeholders in planning and implementation of programme/group work.

· Undertake additional responsibilities such as committee work for agency initiatives.


Requirements

· Possess a Degree in Social Work or Graduate Diploma in Social Work

· Minimum 2 years of relevant experience

· Registered with Social Work Accreditation and Advisory Board

· Proficient in English and at least one other language

· Strong communication and interpersonal skills

· A good team player, dynamic and self-motivated

· Deep passion in reaching out and making a meaningful impact in the lives of those in need

· Only Singaporeans

postedCompany.description:
REACH Community Services Ltd. is a charitable organisation established in 1999 which seeks to inspire hope and empower positive change in vulnerable families, couples, youths and lonely seniors through our 10 community touchpoints: Family Service Centre @ Bishan, Family Service Centre @ Sin Ming, Youth Powerhouse @ Bukit Batok, Counselling Centre @ Shunfu, Senior Centre @Jalan Membina, Senior Centre @ Bukit Batok, Senior Centre @ Bukit Gombak Vista, Active Ageing Centre (Care) @ Teck Whye Vista and Senior Care Centre @ Senja Valley.


• Good career development opportunities

• Great learning opportunities

• Warm and friendly environment
postedCompany.name: REACH COMMUNITY SERVICES LTD.
